Manual Web page collection redirected to login/callback; stopped without credentials or verification
searchEngines.evidence: Sanitized panel text observed: Submitted sitemap table with sitemap.xml; manual crawl blocked by login/callback only

actions: Opened Baidu registration tab supplied by user
Switched the same tab to the free overseas registration route and selected Brazil as the country/region selector
Entered only the user-authorized phone value into the form and requested the verification code
Baidu returned that registration from overseas regions and Hong Kong, Macao and Taiwan is not currently supported
Stopped before SMS code entry, CAPTCHA handling, identity document, ICP, payment, paid service or final account registration submission
searchEngines.evidence: Sanitized panel state observed: Brazil country/region selected; Baidu displayed overseas-registration-not-supported message; no phone, password, email, SMS code or personal identifier stored in evidence.

searchEngines.action: Covered through IndexNow-compatible discovery and public sitemap/robots/canonical/hreflang; no paid service used
searchEngines.evidence: IndexNow accepted-pending status=202 for 32 canonical URLs and Bing IndexNow dashboard lists latest localized URLs

browserAutomation.chromeProfile: authenticated personal Chrome profile used where already signed in; no credentials printed
browserAutomation.exception: Existing Naver Search Advisor tab was reused first. A Naver OAuth/Chrome extension block appeared on recheck, so the remaining Baidu check used an already-open about:blank tab; no new browser tab was created. This deviation is documented instead of silently claiming perfect one-tab compliance.

naver.evidence: Search Advisor showed https://brikaya.com selected and submitted sitemap table containing sitemap.xml registered at 26.07.04 10:16:30.
naver.manualCrawlAttempt: Opening Web page collection redirected to Search Advisor login/callback; stopped without entering password, OTP, CAPTCHA, phone, document or payment data.

baidu.evidence: Baidu free overseas registration route accepted Brazil in the country/region selector, then returned an overseas-registration-not-supported message after requesting a verification code.
baidu.action: Stopped before SMS code entry, CAPTCHA handling, document/ICP/payment, paid service selection, or final account registration submission. User-authorized contact data was used only in the live Baidu form and is intentionally omitted from repository evidence.

keptTabs: Naver Search Advisor sitemap/manual crawl login state
Baidu registration page showing overseas-registration-not-supported state
